section.heading: Recruitment tools

content.p: The Commission may purchase promotional items of nominal value for use in the recruitment of individuals for employment.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 1, 1946, ch. 724, title I, § 170F, as added Pub. L. 109–58, title VI, § 651(c)(2), Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 801.)
